title: Crackdown on infiltration
desc: Zero-tolerance policy — 'detect, delete and deport' undocumented immigrants; seal India-Bangladesh border.

title: DA arrears
desc: Clear all pending Dearness Allowance for government employees and pensioners.

title: 7th Pay Commission
desc: Implement 7th Pay Commission recommendations.

title: 1 crore jobs
desc: Create 1 crore new jobs and self-employment opportunities.

title: ₹3,000 for unemployed youth
desc: Monthly ₹3,000 financial aid to unemployed youth.

title: Durga Suraksha Squads
desc: Women-only police battalions, 'Durga Suraksha Sahaya' scheme.

title: 33% reservation for women
desc: 33% reservation for women in all state government jobs including police.

title: ₹3,000 monthly support for women
desc: Direct bank transfer of ₹3,000 to every eligible woman beneficiary each month.

title: Agricultural support
desc: Enhanced MSP and subsidies for key crops; full rollout of PM Kisan Samman Nidhi.

title: Fishermen welfare
desc: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana; develop modern fish processing units.

title: Uniform Civil Code (UCC)
desc: Legislate and implement UCC ensuring a single uniform set of laws for all citizens.

title: Anti-cattle smuggling law
desc: Strict law to end cattle smuggling across Bengal's borders.

title: Tea industry revival
desc: Rejuvenate old tea gardens; strengthen global branding of Darjeeling Tea.

title: Jute Modernisation
desc: Modernise jute industry and support related workers.

title: Ayushman Bharat
desc: Full implementation of Ayushman Bharat; cancer screening.

title: AIIMS in North Bengal
desc: Establish AIIMS, IIT, and IIM in North Bengal.

title: White Paper on TMC failures
desc: Three White Papers exposing corruption and law-and-order collapse.

title: End syndicate culture
desc: Dismantle grassroots-level syndicate networks; eliminate 'cut money'.

title: Linguistic recognition
desc: Include Kurmali and Rajbanshi languages in the Eighth Schedule.

title: Vande Mataram Museum
desc: Establish a Vande Mataram Museum to promote national heritage.

title: Religious freedom law
desc: Enact a law guaranteeing freedom of religious practices.

title: Political violence commission
desc: Constitute a commission led by a retired Supreme Court judge.

title: Replace fear with trust
desc: Restore faith in the rule of law.

title: Accountable administration
desc: The administrative machinery will be fully accountable.

title: Reopen scam files
desc: Every file on scams and corruption will be reopened.

title: No one above the law
desc: Ministers and officials will be held legally accountable.

title: CAA + Infiltrator deportation
desc: Refugees rights + infiltrators deportation.

title: 7th Pay Commission — immediate
desc: Implement the 7th Pay Commission immediately.

title: MSP guarantee
desc: Ensure fair MSP for paddy, potato, and mango.

title: Industrial parks
desc: Set up new industrial parks; simplify approvals.

title: NEP + STEM
desc: Implement NEP fully; introduce coding in schools.

title: Enhanced pensions
desc: Increase pension amounts; extend PM Awas Yojana.

title: Infrastructure
desc: Connect North/South Bengal; complete metro projects.

title: Tourism development
desc: Promote eco-tourism; spiral circuits.

title: Darjeeling Tea branding
desc: Create internationally promoted brand.

title: UNESCO festivals
desc: Push for UNESCO recognition for Durga Puja.

title: CAA processing
desc: Speed up citizenship applications.

title: Revive Asansol Industry
desc: Revive industrial base; dismantle mafia.

title: HPV vaccination
desc: Free HPV vaccination and cancer screening.

title: Fishermen insurance
desc: Dedicated insurance against cyclone losses.
